databaseVersion: PostgreSQL 17.10 on aarch64-apple-darwin25.0.0, compiled by Apple clang version 17.0.0 (clang-1700.0.13.3), 64-bit
limitations: one event per aggregate without hot-partition skew
lease and acknowledgement only; no network broker publication
no journal, Saga, reconciliation, replica, failover, disk-full, or long-duration load
dirty working tree and small sample; not a public-scale claim
